title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
input_format: A binary tree to serialize and then deserialize.
output_format: The original binary tree reconstructed after serialization/deserialization.
constraints:
- The number of nodes in the tree is in the range `[0, 10^4]`.
- `-1000 <= Node.val <= 1000`
function_signature:
function serialize(root: TreeNode | null): string {}
function deserialize(data: string): TreeNode | null {}
